title: SALUBRITO Christmas Essential Oils Set, Winter Holiday Fragrance Oil Gift Set for Diffuser, Candle, Soap Making, Candy Cane, Christmas Tree, Christmas Pudding, Apple Cinnamon, Gingerbread, Mistletoe
features: 🎄Christmas Holiday Embrace: Deck your halls with festive cheer using SALUBRITO 6x10ml Christmas essential oils set. Featuring delightful aromas like candy cane, Christmas tree, Christmas pudding, apple cinnamon, gingerbread, and mistletoe, it's like a ticket to the ultimate Christmas bash! With the warm notes of apple cinnamon wafting through your home, everyone will be drawn into the holiday merriment.

🎄A Festive Atmosphere Galore: Christmas aromatherapy oils are pure, powerful, and long-lasting—plus they’re vegan and cruelty-free! Celebrate responsibly while indulging in the comforting scent of Christmas pudding. Just pop 3-8 drops into your diffuser and let the festive spirit fill the room.

🎄Magical Christmas Vibes: The refreshing blast of candy cane fragrance oil will hit your senses, signalling that Christmas has truly arrived. Get creative and whip up some seasonal candles, soaps, bath bombs, and bath salts by SALUBRITO holiday scented oils. The joyful essence of Christmas will permeate every corner of your home in delightful ways.

🎄Gingerbread Goodness: Who can resist the charm of gingerbread? This sweet and spicy treat brings holiday joy and evokes memories of festive baking and frosting battles. Plus, the classic aroma of our Christmas tree diffuser oil, infused with pine needles, brings back the heartwarming vibes of tree decorating.

🎄Winter & Christmas Delights: Wrapped in a charming red and green gift box, this set makes the perfect present for essential oil enthusiasts. Gather your family and friends for a joyful New Year’s bash filled with laughter. Rest assured, customer service is here to ensure your satisfaction.
description: Product Description Gingerbread Enchantment The sweet and spicy Christmas dessert essential oil collection exudes festive cheer and is absolutely perfect for evoking fond memories of Christmas treats. Christmas Celebration Party Starter Ticket The classic scent of Christmas tree essential oils gives you the aroma to decorate the warm scene of a Christmas holiday party. The festive scent of apple cinnamon can't wait to escape from the oven! Get ready for the Christmas party! Seasonal Candles Make only cute Christmas shaped candles and let the Christmas scent fill every corner of your home when you light them. Cleaning Bath Salts Irresistible bath fun, let the Christmas scent accompany you from morning to night, the comfortable feeling accompany you all day long. Homemade Soap Utilizing your DIY spirit, handmade aromatherapy soap is a creative idea for you to express your gratitude, enjoy the cleanliness of Christmas soap. Room Sprays Make a portable spray, enjoy the charm of Christmas scent anywhere, you are the star of the party wherever you go! Show off your dance moves now!
